TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official Stryker materials describe the T2 Femur A/R nailing system with dedicated targeting devices and operative technique support.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official product materials describe the femoral nail platform for antegrade or retrograde treatment of femoral shaft and distal femur fractures.
Official materials describe distal and proximal locking options and dynamic locking capability within the T2 system.
Official T2 Femur materials explicitly reference special condyle bolts for distal fixation.

row.system_notes: Antegrade and retrograde femoral intramedullary nailing platform for femoral shaft and distal femur fracture fixation.
